action.reasoning: Observation: Best test accuracy 0.7636 from iter 5 (ConvNeXt+GCE+Mixup+SWA) appears lost (best_model.pt overwritten by ViT run). epoch_35.pt gave 0.7034, far from best. Next best noisy val acc checkpoint is swa_epoch_40.pt (56.30%) from ConvNeXt run. It may yield higher test accuracy despite slightly lower noisy val acc, as SWA model may generalize better. Decision: Submit eval for checkpoints/swa_epoch_40.pt to check if it can beat 0.7034. This is quick (~24 sec). If still low, we will retrain a ConvNeXt model with GCE+Mixup+SWA for ~25 epochs (fits within remaining ~52 min) to aim for 0.76+.
